Commands.Target: var body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : ''; var KEYWORDS = /zus|chagee|tealive|kfc|coffee bean|cbtl|gigi|winrar/i; var orderRe = /Order\s*ID\s*[:\-]?\s*([A-Z0-9]{10,})/gi; var orderMatches = []; var m; while ((m = orderRe.exec(body)) !== null) { orderMatches.push({ id: m[1], index: m.index }); } if (orderMatches.length === 0) { return 'NO_ORDERS_FOUND'; } var debug = []; for (var i = 0; i < orderMatches.length; i++) { var sid = orderMatches[i].id; var start = orderMatches[i].index; var end = i + 1 < orderMatches.length ? orderMatches[i + 1].index : body.length; var section = body.substring(start, Math.min(body.length, end)); var lines = section.split(/[\n\r]+/).map(function(l){ return l.trim(); }).filter(function(l){ return l.length > 0; }); debug.push('=== Order ' + sid + ' ==='); for (var j = 0; j < lines.length; j++) { var line = lines[j]; if (KEYWORDS.test(line)) { var testInline = line.match(/(.+?)\s+x(\d+)\b/i); var testMid = line.match(/(.+?)\s+x(\d+)\s+\d+\.?\d*/i); var testTrailing = line.match(/x(\d+)\b/i); debug.push('Line ' + j + ': ' + line.substring(0,60)); debug.push('  inline match: ' + (testInline ? testInline[0] : 'null')); debug.push('  mid match: ' + (testMid ? testMid[0] : 'null')); debug.push('  trailing match: ' + (testTrailing ? testTrailing[0] : 'null')); } } } return JSON.stringify(debug, null, 2);
